creator: mzaki@e-mail.ne.jp
text: I believe the same applies to upgrading 12.2 to 12.3. In my case, nvd0 had lost when 12.2->12.3 upgrade, on my Precision 5820. I, in panic mode, have further upgraded to 13.1, then I found this PR. The loader tunable (hw.pci.enable_pcie_hp=0) also works fine for my 13.1 environment.
